en: Sam Winchester, soul full of light
ko: 할 수 있는 모든 것을 다하고

en: Running from the dark, searching for what's right
John Winchester, father with a mission
Teaching his boys the art of attrition
Mary Winchester, love lost to the flame
Whispering voice from beyond the pain
Castiel, angel with a broken wing
Learning what it means to feel everything
Bobby Singer, rigid with a heart of gold
Holding the line when the story's told
We hunt the monsters, we save the world
But every victory leaves a scar unfurled Family don't end in blood
It's the choice we make through hell and back
This is our supernatural rock anthem
Sing it from the soul, we're more than hunters
